name: Butter Nut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter thoroughly.
2. Add the balance of ingredients except powdered sugar to the butter and mix until combined.
3. Roll the mixture into walnut-sized balls.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 300° for 35 minutes.
6. Immediately roll each ball in powdered sugar after baking.
7. Cool the cooled cookies on waxed paper.
8. (Cookies may be made in advance and frozen.)
